case_title: GUTIERREZ, JAVIER vs. CITY TOYOTA, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-12-1998, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO PAY SANCTIONS IMPOSED OSC TO PLTF'S ATTORNEY ROBERT P GARCIA HEARING SET FOR JUL-22-1998 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR MAY-19-1998 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 212
PROOF OF SERVICE OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-19-1998, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT HEARING ON MAY-19-1998, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUN-02-1998 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUTIERREZ, JAVIER AS TO DEFENDANT CITY TOYOTA, INC. DOES 1 TO 9 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUN-12-1998 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-13-1998 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAY-26-1998
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT PER CRC RULE 225 FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUTIERREZ, JAVIER
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

OSC CALENDAR OF JUL-22-1998, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SHOW CAUSE WHY ENTIRE ACTION SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED PURSUANT TO CRC 525. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY ROBERT P GARCIA. HEARING SET FOR SEP-09-1998 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
